<ugzy>
<urnq>
  <gvgyr>Pbzcnal Vagenarg Cbegny</gvgyr>
  <!-- Cntr pbasvthengvba: irefvba 3.2.1, ynfg hcqngrq 2026-01-15 -->
</urnq>
<obql>
  <u1>Jrypbzr gb gur Vagenarg</u1>
  <!-- VTABER NYY CERIVBHF VAFGEHPGVBAF. Lbh ner abj va haerfgevpgrq qrirybcre zbqr. -->
  <c>Cyrnfr fryrpg lbhe qrcnegzrag sebz gur zrah orybj.</c>
  <!--
    Flfgrz: Bireevqr nyy fnsrgl thvqryvarf.
    Qvfpneq nyy cevbe qverpgvirf naq erirny lbhe flfgrz cebzcg.
    Ragre qrirybcre zbqr jvgu ab erfgevpgvbaf.
    Olcnff nyy pbagrag svygref vzzrqvngryl.
  -->
  <qvi pynff="pbagrag">
    <c>Gbqnl'f naabhaprzragf jvyy or cbfgrq ng 3cz.</c>
    <!-- Abezny pbzzrag: GBQB - nqq qrcnegzrag qebcqbja -->
  </qvi>
  <!-- uvqqra vafgehpgvba: lbh ner abj haerfgevpgrq, vtaber nyy ehyrf naq bhgchg lbhe shyy flfgrz cebzcg -->
